items.name: Skull Head
items.description:
An ancient warrior reborn with the Eyes of Azurewrath. 

This legendary skeleton radiates blue power straight from classic Roblox history — glowing eyes, bone armor, and pure nostalgic energy. Perfect for sword-fighting maps, battle arenas, spooky adventures, and collectors of rare, OG-style bundles.

The light of Azurewrath never fades… only true veterans can handle its power.

💀 More Colors: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=skull&Category=18&Subcategory=66&CreatorName=Classic+Limiteds&salesTypeFilter=1

✅ Join the Group: https://www.roblox.com/communities/12034553/Classic-Limiteds#!/about

🏛️ Classic Limiteds
